topic: 2028 Democratic nominee candidate poll and market watch
source_note: Seed snapshot transcribed from the image text shared in Discord #the-tide-pool. Corrected after audit: the source columns are Candidate / Markets / Polling / Read.

rows.note: CA gov, shadow campaign, has network and timing; coastal-progressive brand risk.
rows.vibes_rationale: Technically skilled, but the polish cracks under sustained exposure and the positive story reads PR-shaped.

rows.note: Leads polling on name ID; markets discount donor comeback risk less than operatives do.
rows.vibes_rationale: High name ID, but the public style still reads scripted, institutional, and backward-linked to 2024.

rows.note: Obama-tier grassroots energy; general-election ceiling is the priced risk.
rows.vibes_rationale: Authentic, materially specific, and strong at fight-picking; the positive national vision is the weaker leg.

rows.note: PA gov, disciplined Rust Belt messenger; 2026 reelection comes first.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competent patriotic-repair lane with Rust Belt discipline; warmth and long-form ease are less proven nationally.

rows.note: High measured favorability and communication skill; no governor track record or structural base.
rows.vibes_rationale: Probably the cleanest communicator for optimistic repair and long-form normie persuasion.

rows.note: IL gov, deep pockets, anti-Trump fighter posture; could buy into top tier on populist economics.
rows.vibes_rationale: Has fight-picking and material Illinois delivery; authenticity has improved, though the billionaire frame still drags.

rows.note: Georgia-incumbent story depends on Senate reelection first.
rows.vibes_rationale: Calm and polished, but the national story and unscripted emotional texture are still thin.

rows.note: MD gov, Rhodes scholar, combat vet; likely underpriced if markets omit him.
rows.vibes_rationale: Service biography, tone, and material story fit the thesis; long-form proof is thinner, but the signals are strong.

rows.note: Two-term KY gov, southern, religious, moderate; fits the post-2024 candidate-shape argument.
rows.vibes_rationale: Red-state crisis governing gives him competence, decency, specificity, and low-key authentic hope.

rows.note: AZ senator, Marine combat vet, Latino, strong 2024 ticket-split overperformance.
rows.vibes_rationale: Marine vet origin story, swing-state proof, and fight-without-ideology coding make the profile unusually complete.

rows.note: NC gov, won big while Harris lost the state; serious technocrat profile.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competence-and-AG-fight profile fits, but long-form national self and positive vision are still untested.

rows.note: AZ senator, ex-astronaut, ex-Navy, Giffords; clean competent-adult template, low ambition signal.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competent patriotic adult template with broad appeal, but he has not shown much appetite for narrative politics.

rows.note: GA senator, Black pastor, won Georgia three times in four years.
rows.vibes_rationale: Natural moral-patriotic storyteller who can name pain without sounding small or synthetic.

rows.note: MI gov, strong Electoral College math; stock has slipped and gender handwringing weighs on the read.
rows.vibes_rationale: Lived threat, executive record, and fight-picking are real; the story has not fully translated beyond Michigan.

rows.note: MI senator, ex-CIA, security-credentialed moderate; pure dark horse.
rows.vibes_rationale: CIA-pragmatist-moderate profile is authentic and materially specific, but the positive vision is still unfinished.

rows.note: CT senator with aggressive post-2024 fight-harder messaging.
rows.vibes_rationale: Fight-picking is strong, but the positive story is weak and the style can read sermonic.

rows.note: CO gov, term-limited in 2026, anti-orthodoxy moderate-libertarian Democrat, out gay.
rows.vibes_rationale: Independent, relaxed, and anti-orthodox enough for long-form appeal; national emotional story is fuzzy.

rows.note: HI senator, smart progressive policy profile, low national profile.
rows.vibes_rationale: Smart and humane policy voice, but low-profile Senate affect does not yet carry the thesis.

rows.note: Filibuster-record protest moment got attention; 2020 ceiling may still bind.
rows.vibes_rationale: Positive-hopeful language is real but overplayed enough to feel rehearsed; fight-picking can turn theatrical.

rows.note: MN gov, 2024 VP nominee; bench cred but the loss drags on ceiling.
rows.vibes_rationale: Natural long-form performer with normal affect and a real vernacular, though 2024 makes the story contested.

rows.note: Former NC gov, two-term swing-state executive, awkward post-office timeline.
rows.vibes_rationale: Pleasant and competent, but the story is not distinctive enough yet and long-form would likely be fine rather than magnetic.

rows.note: Businessman-celebrity outsider lane; credible for the genre but still longshot.
rows.vibes_rationale: Excellent long-form authenticity and material business language, but office ambition and primary trust are real questions.

rows.note: Reportedly gearing up; probably not viable but reliably appears on lists.
rows.vibes_rationale: Authentic about who he is, unfortunately; old-war-room insider is wrong for the moment.

vibes_check.definition: Patriotic repair: optimistic about America, emotionally normal, clear-eyed without doom, picks fights against systems/abusers/Trumpism rather than voters, and can survive long-form unscripted media without feeling synthetic.

scale.3: Credible fit with one real weakness

vibes_check.note: Shown beside, not inside, the market/poll model. It intentionally tries to capture something not yet clear in polling or market data.
vibes_check.hypothesis: If the thesis is right, higher Vibes Check candidates should begin to improve in polling and/or markets as voters pay closer attention.
vibes_check.label: Subjective read on patriotic-repair affect; hypothesis is that high scorers may gain as voters see more unscripted campaign exposure.
